text: these are the trocar points and that's where the thymus is situated instrument trolley and the dripped robot robot gets wheeled in once the trocars have been introduced
and then comes the step where we would attach the arms of the robot to the trocar which has been placed inside once
these arms have been attached, also known as docking, the instruments are introduced through the docked trocas into the chest cavity of the patient.
Anatomy is inspected, various vessels, ribs, lung apex,
वेगस नर्व, पेरीकार्डियम, फ्रेनिक नर्व और डियाफ्राम इन्स्पेक्टेड हैं। थाइमस जोड़ा जाता है। मेडियास्टिनम में पेरीकार्डियम लेता है।

robotic arms make it easy and convenient for the surgeon to do an accurate dissection in this plane which lies just above the arch of aorta so the tumor is lifted off the arch of aorta centrally and then we move towards the left side of the patient
to take the tumour of the left pleura finally we reach the superior mediastinum by dividing the pleura at that level thymic vein comes into play in this area
where it would be draining into the innominate vein so a careful dissection is required at this level thymic vein is hooked down and then clipped
Subsequently, the thymus gland is then disconnected and hence the thymoma has now been excised.
Estimated blood loss is hardly about 10 ml.
A sterile bag is placed inside the chest and the specimen is put into this sterile bag.
This is then removed from the lower most incision The specimen is sent for histopathology and the robot is put back in its garage Thank you for watching
